title: Charthāwal Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Charthāwal with a Z-Score of +3.49. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Charthāwal is at a critical level, with a Z-Score of +3.49, indicating a significant deviation from normal temperatures. 
 The city is experiencing a high Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.2 GG, while the Heating Degree Day (HDD) value is 0.0 GG, highlighting the intense heat. 
 The relative humidity is at 26%, with a wind speed of 7.4 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the extreme temperatures.
